since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.65%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -2.68% · Gold +0.23% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.65%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.65%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.78%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +28.42%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +28.42%, AMAT +1.78%, LRCX +1.65%, OKLO +1.25%, OKLO +1.25%. Laggards: DLR -4.64%, TTD -3.97%, NXPI -2.76%, FTNT -2.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.96% at $162.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
